add.title: Add Entry
add.description: Add text, images, or PDF documents to your knowledge base.
add.contentPlaceholder: Paste or type your knowledge here...
add.dropZoneText: Drop a file here or click to select

browse.title: Browse
browse.description: Search and manage your knowledge entries.

ask.title: Ask
ask.description: Talk to Perch's AI agent with your saved entries as context.
ask.inputPlaceholder: Ask the agent about your notes, pages, PDFs, and screenshots...
ask.hint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.
ask.emptyState: Ask about anything in your knowledge base. The agent will retrieve related entries first, then answer with source-backed context.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: Automatically extracted concepts from your documents.

graph.title: Knowledge Graph
graph.description: Visual connections between keywords and documents.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure the model used by Perch's AI agent and other LLM-powered tasks.
settings.helpText: The endpoint must be OpenAI-compatible. It is used for both /chat/completions and /embeddings. If you enter only host and port, the app will normalize it to a /v1 base URL automatically.
